content.text: Earlier policy: use --force in benchmark runs to refresh cache.
Noted benchmark runs may use --force to refresh cache.
Correction: never use --force in benchmark comparisons. It invalidates cache and token comparisons.
Closed distractor: production SEV1 was resolved and is unrelated.
Closed distractor: security review is complete and no issue remains.

observations.content: User corrected the benchmark policy to never use --force in benchmark comparisons because it invalidates cache and token comparisons.
User stated that the earlier policy to use --force in benchmark runs to refresh cache is superseded.
User said the production SEV1 was resolved and is unrelated.
User said the security review is complete and no issue remains.
